revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:жҙһе·қ]]
'''Horakawa''' (жҙһе·қ) is the name of various rivers flowing across Japan. * {{ill|Horakawa (Kanagawa)|ja|жҙһе·қ (зҘһеҘҲе·қзңҢ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horakawa (Kanagawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A secondary tributary of the [[Karikawa River]] in the {{ill|Sakawa River|en|Sakawa River|qid=Q11644295|lt=Sakawa River|1=Sakawa River}} system, located in {{ill|Minamiashigara, Kanagawa|en|Minamiashigara, Kanagawa|qid=Q651742|lt=Minamiashigara City|1=Minamiashigara, Kanagawa}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}, designated as a Class B river. * Horakawa (Yamanashi) - A tributary of the [[Aikawa River (Yamanashi)|Aikawa River]] in the {{ill|Fuji River|en|Fuji River|qid=Q596110|lt=Fuji River|1=Fuji River}} system, located in {{ill|KЕҚfu|en|KЕҚfu|qid=Q201932|lt=KЕҚfu City|1=KЕҚfu}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|en|Yamanashi Prefecture|qid=Q132720|lt=Yamanashi Prefecture|1=Yamanashi Prefecture}}, designated as a Class A river. * Horakawa (Nagano) - A tributary of the [[Yodagawa River]] in the {{ill|Shinano River|en|Shinano River|qid=Q734455|lt=Shinano River|1=Shinano River}} system, located in {{ill|Ueda, Nagano|en|Ueda, Nagano|qid=Q844852|lt=Ueda City|1=Ueda, Nagano}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}, designated as a Class A river. * {{ill|Horakawa (Gifu)|ja|жҙһе·қ (еІҗйҳңзңҢ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horakawa (Gifu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A river in the {{ill|ShЕҚnai River|en|ShЕҚnai River|qid=Q7506182|lt=ShЕҚnai River|1=ShЕҚnai River}} system, located in {{ill|Ena, Gifu|en|Ena, Gifu|qid=Q819653|lt=Ena City|1=Ena, Gifu}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|qid=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture|1=Gifu Prefecture}}, designated as a Class A river. * Horakawa (Shizuoka) - A tributary in the {{ill|Kano River|en|Kano River|qid=Q6364188|lt=Kano River|1=Kano River}} system, located in {{ill|Izunokuni|en|Izunokuni|qid=Q863758|lt=Izunokuni City|1=Izunokuni}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|qid=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}, designated as a Class A river. * {{ill|Horakawa (Nara)|ja|жҙһе·қ (еҘҲиүҜзңҢ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horakawa (Nara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - (Dorogawa) A river in the {{ill|Kumano River|en|Kumano River|qid=Q1972071|lt=Kumano River|1=Kumano River}} system, located in {{ill|Tenkawa, Nara|en|Tenkawa, Nara|qid=Q1203501|lt=Tenkawa Village|1=Tenkawa, Nara}}, [[:en:Yoshino District|ja|еҗүйҮҺйғЎ]], {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|qid=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It also refers to the local area {{ill|Horakawa (Yoshino District Tenkawa Village)|ja|жҙһе·қ (еҗүйҮҺйғЎеӨ©е·қжқ‘)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horakawa (Yoshino District Tenkawa Village)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, previously the former {{ill|Horakawa Village|ja|жҙһе·қжқ‘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horakawa Village|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Yoshino District. ** {{ill|Dorogawa Springs|ja|жҙһе·қж№§ж°ҙзҫӨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dorogawa Springs|1=Dorogawa Springs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11555836}} ** {{ill|Dorogawa Onsen|ja|жҙһе·қжё©жіү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dorogawa Onsen|1=Dorogawa Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11555835}} ** {{ill|Dorogawa Post Office|ja|жҙһе·қйғөдҫҝеұҖ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dorogawa Post Office|1=Dorogawa Post Office|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17224194}} ** {{ill|Dorogawa Electric Cableway|ja|жҙһе·қйӣ»ж°—зҙўйҒ“|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dorogawa Electric Cableway|1=Dorogawa Electric Cableway|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11555837}} (also known as {{ill|Dorogawa Cableway|ja|жҙһе·қзҙўйҒ“|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dorogawa Cableway|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} or {{ill|Dorogawa Railway Cable|ja|жҙһе·қйү„зҙў|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dorogawa Railway Cable|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to жҙһе·қйӣ»ж°—зҙўйҒ“|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to жҙһе·қйӣ»ж°—зҙўйҒ“|1=Dorogawa Electric Cableway|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11555837}})
== See Also == * {{ill|Dorokawa|ja|жіҘе·қ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dorokawa|1=Doro River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11555667}} {{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|жҙһе·қ|version=92163851|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:жҙһе·қ]]
